mnemonics.title: Central Tendency Measures
mnemonics.content: MMM - Mean, Median, Mode - the three M's of central tendency

mnemonics.title: Dispersion Measures
mnemonics.content: Very Smart Dogs Run In Parks - Variance, Standard deviation, Deviation, Range, IQR, Percentiles

mnemonics.title: Box Plot Components
mnemonics.content: 5 Number Summary: Min, Q1, Med, Q3, Max - Remember 'My Quarterback Makes Moves'
